title: Neyyadiappar Temple
tagline: Neyyadiappar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Neyyadiappar Temple, Tillaistanam is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located in the village of Thillaisthanam also known as Tillaisthanam or Thiruneithanam in Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Neyyadiappar Temple, Tillaistanam is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located in the village of Thillaisthanam also known as Tillaisthanam or Thiruneithanam in Tamil Nadu, India. It is significant to the Hindu sect of Shaivism as one of the Saptasthanam, the seven temples associated with Aiyarappar temple in Thiruvaiyaru. Shiva is represented by the lingam in the form of Neyyadiappar. His consort Parvati is depicted as Piraisoodi Amman.

topPlaces.name: Thiruvaiyaru
topPlaces.description: Thiruvaiyaru (also spelled as Tiruvaiyaru or Tiruvayyaru) is a town in Thanjavur District in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Aiyarappar Temple
topPlaces.description: Aiyarappar is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located in the village of Tiruvaiyaru, Tamil Nadu, India. Shiva is worshiped as Aiyarappar, and is represented by the lingam and his consort Parvati is depicted as AramValarthaNaayagi.

topPlaces.name: Rajagopalaswamy Temple, Kumbakonam
topPlaces.description: Rajagopalaswamy Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Vishnu located at Kumbakonam in Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Perumpuliyur
topPlaces.description: Perumpuliyur is a village in the Thiruvaiyaru taluk of Thanjavur district in Tamil Nadu, India. The village is known for the Vyagrapureeswarar Temple.

topPlaces.name: Hara Saabha Vimocchana Perumal Temple
topPlaces.description: Hara Saabha Vimochana Perumal Temple in Thirukandiyur, a village in the outskirts of Thiruvayaru in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, is dedicated to the Hindu god Vishnu. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is glorified in the Nalayira Divya Prabandham, the early medieval Tamil canon of the Alvar saints from the 6th–9th centuries CE. It is one of the 108 Divya Desam dedicated to Vishnu, who is worshipped as Hara Saabha Vimochana Perumal and his consort Lakshmi as Kamalavalli Nachiyar.

topPlaces.name: Kandeeswarar Temple, Kandiyur
topPlaces.description: Kandeeswarar Temple (also called Brahmakandeeswarar temple, Brahmasirakandeeswarar temple and Veerataneeswarar temple) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the god Shiva located in Kandiyur also known as Thirukkandiyur or Tirukkandiyur, near Tiruvaiyaru, Tamil Nadu, India. Shiva is worshiped as Kandeeswarar, and is represented by the lingam and his consort Parvati is depicted as Mangalanayagi.

topPlaces.name: Kailasanathar Temple, Thingalur
topPlaces.description: The Chandiranaar Temple (also called Kailasanathar temple or Thingalur temple) is a Hindu temple in the village of Thingalur, 16 kilometres (9.9 mi) from Thanjavur and 33 kilometres (21 mi) from Kumbakonam on the Kumbakonam - Thiruvaiyaru road in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The presiding deity is Soma (moon).

topPlaces.name: Melathiruppanthuruthi
topPlaces.description: Melathiruppanthuruthi is a panchayat town in Thanjavur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.South India's Cleanest town panchayat and best in Solid waste management in south zone awarded by central government of India (swachh survekshan) 2019-2020 (under 25000 population category).

items.note: Thiruvaiyaru (also spelled as Tiruvaiyaru or Tiruvayyaru) is a town in Thanjavur District in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

Aiyarappar is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located in the village of Tiruvaiyaru, Tamil Nadu, India. Shiva is worshiped as Aiyarappar, and is represented by the lingam and his consort Parvati is depicted as AramValarthaNaayagi.
Rajagopalaswamy Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Vishnu located at Kumbakonam in Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.
Perumpuliyur is a village in the Thiruvaiyaru taluk of Thanjavur district in Tamil Nadu, India. The village is known for the Vyagrapureeswarar Temple.

Hara Saabha Vimochana Perumal Temple in Thirukandiyur, a village in the outskirts of Thiruvayaru in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, is dedicated to the Hindu god Vishnu. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is glorified in the Nalayira Divya Prabandham, the early medieval Tamil canon of the Alvar saints from the 6th–9th centuries CE. It is one of the 108 Divya Desam dedicated to Vishnu, who is worshipped as Hara Saabha Vimochana Perumal and his consort Lakshmi as Kamalavalli Nachiyar.

Kandeeswarar Temple (also called Brahmakandeeswarar temple, Brahmasirakandeeswarar temple and Veerataneeswarar temple) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the god Shiva located in Kandiyur also known as Thirukkandiyur or Tirukkandiyur, near Tiruvaiyaru, Tamil Nadu, India. Shiva is worshiped as Kandeeswarar, and is represented by the lingam and his consort Parvati is depicted as Mangalanayagi.

The Chandiranaar Temple (also called Kailasanathar temple or Thingalur temple) is a Hindu temple in the village of Thingalur, 16 kilometres (9.9 mi) from Thanjavur and 33 kilometres (21 mi) from Kumbakonam on the Kumbakonam - Thiruvaiyaru road in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The presiding deity is Soma (moon).

Melathiruppanthuruthi is a panchayat town in Thanjavur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.South India's Cleanest town panchayat and best in Solid waste management in south zone awarded by central government of India (swachh survekshan) 2019-2020 (under 25000 population category).

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Neyyadiappar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Neyyadiappar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Neyyadiappar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (45 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (46 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Neyyadiappar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Neyyadiappar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Neyyadiappar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Neyyadiappar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Neyyadiappar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Thiruvaiyaru, Aiyarappar Temple, Rajagopalaswamy Temple, Kumbakonam, Perumpuliyur, Hara Saabha Vimocchana Perumal Temple.
